players.tagline: The electric forward at the heart of the Spirit's attack.

questions.prompt: What position does Trinity Rodman play for the Spirit?
questions.revealFact: She's a forward — pace, dribbling and end product all in one.

questions.prompt: What squad number does she wear for Washington?
questions.revealFact: Rodman wears the No. 2 for the Spirit.

questions.prompt: How many goals has she scored so far this NWSL season?
questions.revealFact: Three goals — and counting — in the 2026 campaign.

questions.prompt: How many assists does she have this season?
questions.revealFact: Four assists — she creates as much as she finishes.

questions.prompt: How many matches has she started this season?
questions.revealFact: Eleven starts — a fixture in the Spirit's front line.

questions.prompt: Roughly how many minutes has she logged this season?
questions.revealFact: About 900 minutes on the pitch this season.

questions.prompt: Which country does Trinity Rodman represent internationally?
questions.revealFact: She's a full United States international.

questions.prompt: In which year was she born?
questions.revealFact: Born in 2002 — one of the league's brightest young talents.

questions.prompt: True or false: she has started every match she's appeared in this season.
questions.revealFact: True — every one of her appearances this season has been a start.

questions.prompt: True or false: she plays her club soccer for the Washington Spirit.
questions.revealFact: True — Rodman has been a cornerstone of the Washington Spirit.
